# Valere

Valere is a shared photo gallery for weddings and events. Guests scan a QR
code and upload photos straight from their phone — no app download, no
account required. The organizer gets one shared gallery per event, viewable
live and downloadable as a ZIP. Pricing is a one-time fee per event based on
guest count, not a subscription.

- [Homepage](https://www.valere.co.za/)
- [Pricing](https://www.valere.co.za/#pricing)
- [How it works](https://www.valere.co.za/#how-it-works)
